channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Merged for 2.16

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/51499/
Subject: LU-15626 tests: Remove variables not used
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 9c69503be7f437bc951cbab8c6e29f265c00bbe7
